headers.name: Subject
headers.value: The People Reviewing AI Research Are Using AI to Do It

snippet: 21% of peer reviews at the world's largest AI conference were AI-generated. The system designed to validate research is breaking from the inside. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏
